entry.title: IDC HHSO100201200004I (5) awarded to EMERGENT MANUFACTURING OPERATIONS BALTIMORE LLC, was modified for the amount of -$60,008.8

ns1:agencyID.name: OFFICE OF ASSISTANT SECRETARY FOR PREPAREDNESS AND RESPONSE

ns1:contractingOfficeAgencyID.name: OFFICE OF ASSISTANT SECRETARY FOR PREPAREDNESS AND RESPONSE
ns1:contractingOfficeAgencyID.departmentName: HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES, DEPARTMENT OF

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: OFF ASST SEC ADM AND MGMT

ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.name: OFFICE OF ASSISTANT SECRETARY FOR PREPAREDNESS AND RESPONSE
ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.departmentName: HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES, DEPARTMENT OF

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: OFF ASST SEC ADM AND MGMT

ns1:contractData.ns1:majorProgramCode: CENTERS FOR INNOVATION IN ADVANCED DEVELOPMENT AND MANUFACTURING
ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE DATE THAT CONTRACTOR MUST PROVIDE THE CONTRACTING OFFICER WITH A WRITTEN DESCRIPTION OF THE SPECIFIC PANDEMIC INFLUENZA VACCINE CANDIDATE THAT IT INTENDS TO UTILIZE TO FULFILL CLIN 0001 UNDER B.2.1.1 LUMP SUM - BASE PERIOD FOR PANDEMIC INFLUENZA CANDIDATE (CLIN 0001) FROM:
NO LATER THAN SIX (6) MONTHS AFTER AWARD (DECEMBER 15, 2012)
TO:
JANUARY 11, 2013
DELETE B.3.3 IN ITS ENTIRETY AND REPLACE WITH:
FAILURE TO MEET THE LICENSING REQUIREMENTS WITHIN THE DEADLINE (JANUARY 11, 2013) SPECIFIED UNDER SECTION B. 2.1.1 SHALL CONSTITUTE GROUNDS FOR TERMINATION OF ANY CONTRACT AWARDED IN RESPONSE TO THIS SOLICITATION. THE TERMINATION SHALL BE AT THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE CONTACTING OFFICER. IN THE EVENT THAT THE CONTRACTOR FAILS TO MEET THE DEADLINE (JANUARY 11,2013) SPECIFIED UNDER SECTION B 2.1.1, AND, AS A RESULT, THE CONTRACTOR INCURS ADDITIONAL PERFORMANCE COSTS NECESSARY TO MEET ANY OBJECTIVE IN THE CONTRACT, THE CONTRACTOR WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR THOSE ADDITIONAL COSTS, AND THOSE INCURRED COSTS MAY NOT BE CHARGED TO ANY CLIN IN ANY CONTRACT AWARDED IN RESPONSE TO THIS SOLICITATION.
IN CONSIDERATION FOR THE EXTENDED PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE ASSOCIATED WITH CLIN 0001 EMERGENT HAS AGREED TO WAIVE $60,008.80 OF THE USG'S PORTION FOR THE FTO ANALYSIS COST FOUND IN CLIN 0002. __________________________

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
